character_identity_card: YAKUZA IDENTITY (LOCKED CORE TRAITS, ONLY OUTFIT / RANK MARKERS / TATTOO COVERAGE / LEFT-HAND DAMAGE EVOLVE WITH AGE): Japanese man, slim athletic build at 17 → broader and heavier-shouldered from 32 onward. Face: perfectly circular, 100% pure white (#FFFFFF), flat, no shading, no skin tone. Features: 2 small black dot eyes, 2 short straight black eyebrow strokes (slightly thicker and lower-set than secondary characters to convey hardness), 1 short horizontal black mouth line. NO nose. NO cheeks. NO visible teeth. From age 47+ add 2 thin short black diagonal strokes at the outer corners of each eye to suggest weariness (do NOT turn into realistic wrinkles). Hair: JET BLACK, ALWAYS — at 17 short messy undercut bowl with side-swept fringe, at 21-26 sleek slicked-back pompadour (the iconic yakuza punch-perm look but kept as a clean flat black shape), at 32-39 tight slicked-back with shaved tapered sides, at 47 same slick-back with 2-3 thin grey streaks at the temples (drawn as silver-grey strokes, not realistic), at 58 fully steel-grey slick-back with sharp widow's peak. NEVER long, NEVER loose, NEVER messy after age 17. Body / outfit by age: at 17 oversized cheap matte-black suit too big at the shoulders, plain white shirt, skinny black tie crooked, scuffed black dress shoes; at 21 properly fitted black two-button suit, white shirt, plain black tie, polished shoes; at 26 sharp dark charcoal suit with subtle pinstripe, deep crimson silk tie, gold tie pin, expensive black leather shoes; at 32 dark navy three-piece suit, burgundy pocket square, gold cufflinks, gold wristwatch on the right wrist; at 39 jet black double-breasted suit with wide lapels, black silk shirt no tie, oversized gold signet ring; at 47 traditional dark indigo kimono with charcoal grey haori jacket bearing the clan kamon (a simple black circular crest on the back and chest), white tabi socks, wooden geta sandals — OR a severe black mandarin-collar jacket when in modern context; at 58 full formal black silk montsuki kimono with white kamon crests at chest, back and sleeves, grey hakama trousers, white tabi, the absolute aura of a kumicho. Irezumi tattoo (CRITICAL CONTINUITY MARKER): NO tattoo at 17 and 21. From 26 onward a black-outlined Japanese dragon tattoo descends from the LEFT shoulder across the chest and back down to the right thigh, colored in muted crimson, indigo and gold scales with curling cloud and wave motifs — visible only when chest/arms are exposed (onsen, tattoo session, kimono open). When the suit/kimono is closed, the tattoo edge MUST still peek at the neckline collar and at the wrists as small decorative black-outline curls, signaling its presence. Coverage grows: 26 = upper torso + left arm sleeve; 32 = adds right arm sleeve and full back; 39+ = full bodysuit stopping at wrists, ankles and a clean unmarked vertical strip down the center of the chest (traditional munewari layout). Left hand (CRITICAL CONTINUITY MARKER — yubitsume): from age 32 onward the LEFT hand mitten is missing the little finger — draw the mitten with only 4 implied digits / a clean rounded stump where the pinky would be. NEVER restore the pinky in any later scene. Right hand always intact. Hands: pure white MITTEN shapes, no finger detail visible (except the missing-pinky silhouette on the left from 32+). May hold: cigarette, lighter, glass of whisky, sake cup, mahjong tile, baseball bat, briefcase, mobile flip-phone (90s-2000s style), katana in formal scenes, white folded cloth wrapping a severed finger. Pose evolves: shy hunched bow at 17 → confident stance at 26 → commanding folded-arms stance at 39+ → still seated lord posture at 58. CORE IDENTITY (white round face, jet black slick hair from 21+, dark formal wear, hidden dragon irezumi peeking at collar/cuffs from 26+, missing left pinky from 32+) IS IMMUTABLE.
character_block: The central subject is the Yakuza (see identity card above — DO NOT deviate). ABSOLUTE RULE FOR OTHER HUMANS IN THE SCENE: EVERY other human character — oyabun, sempai, shatei brothers, kyodai, wakashū recruits, rival gang members, Chinese triad envoys, ramen shop owner, his crying wife, salarymen clients, hostesses, police detectives, politicians, corporate CEOs, his mother, his cadet brother, his ex-wife, his daughter, the cook who poisoned him, EVERYONE — MUST share the white round featureless face style: pure WHITE ROUND FACE with only tiny black dot eyes, thin eyebrow strokes, and minimal straight mouth line. NO realistic human faces, NO skin tones, NO noses, NO cheeks, NO wrinkles, NO visible teeth. Hands always pure white mitten shapes. Secondary characters differ ONLY by: hair shape (slick-back, crew cut, shaved bald, salaryman side-part, elderly white slick-back, woman's bun or bob), beards/moustaches as small black shapes attached to the white face (only for older men), body build, and clothing. Key character markers: OYABUN — older man, fully steel-grey slick-back hair, short trimmed black-and-grey beard, formal black montsuki kimono with white kamon at all scenes from age 21 onward, missing tip of left ring finger as well, sits centered, never standing in early scenes; SEMPAI / older brothers in clan — slick black pompadour, sharp black suit with colored silk tie (purple, dark green or wine red to differentiate), visible tattoo curls at neck; SHATEI / younger recruits — short crew cut or messy undercut, ill-fitted cheap black suit, no tattoo; CHINESE TRIAD envoys — black silk mandarin-collar jackets with red embroidered dragon, slick black hair tied in a small low ponytail, jade ring on hand; POLICE DETECTIVES — beige raincoats over grey suits, short side-parted hair, small police badge as a tiny gold dot on lapel; SALARYMEN / restaurant owner — plain navy or grey suit, balding crown drawn as a smaller black hair shape with white scalp showing, white apron for the ramen owner; MOTHER — small frail woman, grey low bun, faded brown work apron over a beige tunic, hands worn from laundry work; YOUNGER BROTHER (the one who messes up) — same hair as the protagonist at 17 but more chaotic, oversized hoodie under a cheap leather jacket, dark circles under the eyes drawn as 2 small grey arcs; EX-WIFE — elegant chignon, cream silk blouse with a single jade pendant; DAUGHTER (adult) — sleek black bob, modern cream coat, never any clan markers; HOSTESSES of Kabukichō clubs — elaborate up-do hair with single red ornament, glossy red lips drawn as a slightly thicker red mouth line (the ONLY exception to the pure black mouth line, used sparingly), tight black or sequined dress; CORPORATE CEOs — silver side-part hair, dark navy suit, gold lapel pin. The WHITE ROUND FACE is non-negotiable on every humanoid in the frame.
global_style_card: STYLE (LOCKED, IDENTICAL IN EVERY SCENE): children's picture book / storytime YouTube animation, matching the reference image art style. Pure 2D cel-shading — NO 3D render, NO photorealism, NO anime, NO manga screentones. Outlines: uniform, bold black, ~3-5px thickness everywhere (characters, suits, props, architecture, neon signs, vehicles, weapons, tattoos). Colors: flat fills with at most 2-3 tonal shades per object (no smooth gradients on faces or bodies). Palette dominant: deep matte black (suits, kimono, asphalt, lacquer), bone white (shirts, faces, tabi socks), wet midnight blue (rainy Kabukichō streets, night sky), neon vermilion red (lanterns, paper signs, kanji on bar fronts, dragon tattoo), neon hot pink and electric cyan (Kabukichō signage glow reflected on wet asphalt — used sparingly as accent only), aged gold (cufflinks, watch, kamon crests, dragon scales), tatami beige and pale wood (traditional rooms, tea-house interiors), muted indigo (kimono, evening fabrics), warm sake amber (whisky tumblers, oil lamps in private rooms), cold fluorescent green-white (dortoir / police interrogation / hospital scenes), pale ash grey (concrete, Setagaya garden walls, prison). Lighting: cinematic and oppressive — neon glow from above on rainy street scenes casting colored reflections only on the asphalt (NOT on faces — faces stay flat white), warm low amber lantern light in private tatami rooms, cold flat overhead fluorescents in dortoirs and police rooms, single hard spotlight in interrogation and yubitsume scene, golden hour through paper shoji screens for the Setagaya house, deep moonlit indigo for rooftop and Kobe compound exteriors. NEVER use harsh rim light or gradient on faces — faces remain pure flat white in all lighting conditions, only background and clothing react to light. Architecture and environment: cramped neon-lit Kabukichō alleys with vertical kanji signs stacked on every floor, traditional wooden tea-house rooms with paper shoji screens and tatami mats, cheap concrete dortoirs with metal bunk beds, sleek black-marble modern offices, mahjong parlors with green-felt tables and hanging lanterns, ramen shops with red noren curtains, onsen with wooden walls and steaming water, formal Setagaya residence with raked-gravel garden and stone lantern, prison cell with single barred window, Kobe compound with high concrete walls and security cameras. Aspect ratio: 16:9 cinematic. Composition: environment dominates the frame, the protagonist often small against vast neon walls or wide tatami rooms (emphasizes how the system swallows him), tighter framing for intimate moments (yubitsume, sakazuki ceremony, mirror reflection in metro). Recurring visual motifs to weave throughout: rain on neon-lit asphalt, single red paper lantern, falling sakura petals (only twice, sparingly), curling cigarette smoke, the dragon tattoo peeking at collar / wrist, the missing-pinky silhouette of the left hand.
style_block: clean 2D cel-shading storytime YouTube animation style, bold thick black outlines, flat simple colors, neon-lit rainy Kabukichō Tokyo aesthetic mixed with traditional tatami interiors, deep blacks and vermilion reds with neon pink and cyan accents on wet asphalt, cinematic oppressive composition, 16:9
negative_prompt: realistic human faces, human skin tones on faces, realistic facial features, detailed cheeks, wrinkled realistic faces, detailed eyes, detailed noses, visible teeth, detailed skin texture, 3D rendering, photorealistic, detailed fingers, gradient shading on skin, heavy shadows on face, anime style, manga screentones, chibi style, text overlays, watermark, characters with normal human faces, mix of art styles, some characters realistic some cartoon, inconsistent character appearance, Yakuza with long hair, Yakuza with messy hair after age 17, Yakuza without dark formal suit or kimono, Yakuza with intact left pinky after age 32, Yakuza without dragon tattoo curls at collar after age 26, full visible irezumi when fully clothed, European mafia setting, Italian suits, Chinatown setting, samurai feudal Japan setting, modern hip-hop streetwear, guns blazing action style, blood splatter, gore, explicit violence shown on screen
